pages.text: Aredrite is an End-born gemstone used for high-tier armor and late-game progression.
$(l)Mining note$()$(br)Aredrite Ore is meant to be found only in the $(l)End$(), and should be mined with a $(l)diamond tool or better$().

$(l)Piece effects$()$(br)$(li)$(item)Helmet$(): Removes $(thing)Blindness$() and $(thing)Darkness$() while worn$(li)$(item)Chestplate$(): Grants $(thing)Resistance$() at low health; stronger while $(l)Branded$()$(li)$(item)Leggings$(): Increase movement speed; stronger in the $(l)End$() and stronger still while $(l)Branded$()$(li)$(item)Boots$(): Negate fall damage in the $(l)End$(), and greatly reduce it elsewhere

$(l)Set bonuses$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)2 Pieces — Witnessed$(): Nearby hostile creatures cause the armor to harden around the wearer.$(li)$(thing)3 Pieces — Hollow Pressure$(): If at least 3 hostiles are nearby, they are slowed and weakened while you gain Regeneration$(li)$(thing)4 Pieces — Last Horizon$(): While $(l)Branded$(), a lethal blow is denied, nearby enemies are weakened and revealed, and you gain a brief survival burst. This effect has a long cooldown.

Aredrite is not ordinary armor. It is meant to feel like End-forged survival gear that sharpens further beneath the Oath. The full set turns danger into pressure, recovery, and one final refusal to die.
